_template: Capability lane template for repairing provider/tool auth without raw credential custody. Copy into evyverse-authority only through the signed authority workflow.

mustConfirm: plain git operation works without sandbox escalation

rules: redact usernames only when they identify private third parties
store scope names and tool names only

recovery.command: stop dependent provider action; restore prior redacted git credential helper configuration or revoke/narrow provider grant through provider-native UI
